name: Western Limo
recent_news: No public news identified; appears to be a very small independent limo/livery operator in Ridgefield, NJ. No evidence of school-bus contracts or special-needs student transportation despite source-list tag.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit tuck-in: 2-employee limo operator with no confirmed school bus or SPED student routes. Below minimum scale and outside core school-contract model.

name: Onward Care Inc
recent_news: Onward (onwardrides.com) is a venture-backed Door-Through-Door assisted rideshare and transportation management software platform for healthcare; not a school bus contractor. Founded 2018, led by Mike Lewis.
fit_notes: Not a fit: healthcare-focused NEMT/rideshare tech platform, not a yellow-bus or SPED student-transport operator. Different business model and venture-funded ownership.

name: Chicago Express Trnsprtn LLC
recent_news: NPI-registered Transportation Broker (taxonomy 347E00000X) arranging wheelchair vans, taxis, stretcher cars, and bus passes for medical-services access. No school bus or SPED student-route activity identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit: Medicaid NEMT broker, not a school-bus operating contractor. No buses, no district contracts, wrong vertical for Summit tuck-in.

name: My Limo Inc
recent_news: No public news identified; very small Chicago-area limo/livery operator. No evidence of school-bus contracts or student transportation services despite source-list special-needs tag.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit: 2-employee limo company with no confirmed school district routes or SPED contracts. Sub-scale and outside core yellow-bus/SPED model.

name: Reliable Limo Inc
recent_news: Locally owned and operated since 1999 in Kankakee, IL; services include events, airport transfers, corporate outings, and charters. No school bus or SPED student transportation services identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit: small Kankakee limo/charter operator focused on events, airport, and corporate work. No school district contracts or SPED routes; wrong vertical for Summit tuck-in.
